data.name: Cyberpunk Sex Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Cyberpunk Sex Simulator is a simulation game whose ultimate goal is to give you pleasure!

This time you will find yourself in the future, where you can have sex with hot cyber girls or ordinary ones if you like classics.
Deep costomization will allow you to customize the character the way you want. You can change implants, add weapons and of course change a large number of clothes.

But most importantly - you can have sex with the girl created in the popular setting "cyberpunk"! Many different poses and endings will not let your imagination get bored! In addition, all this is made in the form of simple mini-games, where you will need to control all with ONE HAND!

data.short_description: A simulator in the style of cyberpunk that will cheer you up! And in fact, not only the mood. In this game, control takes only one hand!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 德文*, 簡體中文*, 俄文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 匈牙利文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® XP / Vista / 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 128 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with DirectX 8.1
  • DirectX: 版本：8.1
  • 儲存空間: 115 MB 可用空間
